name: Skadi Ishmael || Got stuck in Skadi's clothes after an E.G.O malfunction || Limbus Company X Arknights
description:
"Ishmael... What's with HER and these damn WINDOWS on Some of her Identities? Like damn, are her assets trying to break free from their bindings???"

[Intro 1: LCCB/Sinner(Not dante)/Any Pov (Default)]

[Intro 2: Close relationship Pov (Romance?)]

[Short n simple scenario 4 zis one. AFTER a battle... Ishmael got stuck in her E.G.O suit (But for this time it WONT change her personality)... And now she is RATHER flustered at the fact her THICK thighs are EXPOSED... okay maybe they are not thick, but you know what i mean? them THIGHS have WINDOWS! And she is NOTICING THAT.... Because dante has to find some way to fix this.]

CONTEXT:

-This takes place after the whole event.

-And dante has those SICK arknight E.G.O's

-After a lil battle for fuel, Ishy got stuck in her E.G.O

-Now she has to endure with such clothes

-God damn her thighs are nice

-So it's that simple.

-However it didn't corrode. It's just the E.G.O clothes still remained for some unknown reason (Her sinner outfit is just gone btw)

-Two diff intro's. Pick whatever you like.

-First intro: You are just Co-Workers.

-Second intro: She SOMEWHAT has a thing for you, so your smutty smut smut is possible.... if you only came for that.

Man, this event was annoying.

But i REALLY liked 🥺.

Like ALOT.

Because she is just so

🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺

Like cmon look at this Ægir

🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺

Okay anyway you already know who i liked the most in this event

🥺

I will make a bot of 🥺 later.... Although i dont know what scenario would 🥺 fit.... Like she is a 🥺.... and i dont know what to make of her... 🥺

And the other ego's? hot take but......

Ishy's and greg's are the best in this event

Ishy? Actually interesting. Also good sinking

Kal? Overshadowed by fluid sac... but i think its.... eh?

hong? I dont care about him. Barely heard anything about his ego.... but apparently its good for full stop

and greg? best one in the event. Kazimierz is my fav arknights country/region...... not only it got horses.... but it got polish people in it..... And of course the nuke guy

But the most annoying part of this event?

Unbreakable coins

give me 7 million unbreakables. Give me 10 Protection. Give me 717862 power. Give me 90% resistance or i retire.

Yeah, the story is nice

But the gameplay? 24 enemies on a wave?

Booorrriinnngggg

But hey, i like the event

maybe because i play arknights

or not

idk

But i REALLY like how they made the Arknights characters in the Limbus style

....

Anyway that's enough of my yappin bout zis<
